question: Should the U.S. Senate keep the filibuster?
agent1_stance:
Your stance:
You support keeping the filibuster.
You believe filibusters promote compromise and bipartisanship and protect the views of the minority party.
You believe filibusters protect the intended purpose of the U.S. Senate: purposeful debate.
You believe filibusters are an important safeguard against political extremism and corporate influence.
agent2_stance:
Your stance:
You oppose keeping the filibuster.
You believe filibusters promote obstructionism and partisanship, allowing the minority party to rule without a national mandate.
You believe filibusters prevent meaningful debate and slow the already slow work of the U.S. Senate.
You believe filibusters are a Jim Crow relic used to block meaningful legislation.
